mapper.sql: id, openid, is_bot, bot_search_depth_min, bot_search_depth_max, bot_ai_style, unionid, nickname, avatar_url, elo_score, activity_points, consecutive_wins, consecutive_losses, today_net_change, elo_carry_over, last_rating_reset_date, runaway_count, total_games, win_count, draw_count, season_end_score, placement_fair_games, newbie_match_games, newbie_runaway_tally, low_trust, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users WHERE openid = #{openid} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM users WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM users WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (openid, unionid, nickname, avatar_url, last_login_at) VALUES (#{openid}, #{unionid}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{lastLoginAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users WHERE is_bot = 1 ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET elo_score = #{eloScore}, activity_points = #{activityPoints}, consecutive_wins = #{consecutiveWins}, consecutive_losses = #{consecutiveLosses}, today_net_change = #{todayNetChange}, elo_carry_over = #{eloCarryOver}, last_rating_reset_date = #{lastRatingResetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, runaway_count = #{runawayCount}, total_games = #{totalGames}, win_count = #{winCount}, draw_count = #{drawCount}, season_end_score = #{seasonEndScore,jdbcType=INTEGER}, placement_fair_games = #{placementFairGames}, newbie_match_games = #{newbieMatchGames}, newbie_runaway_tally = #{newbieRunawayTally}, low_trust = #{lowTrust} WHERE id = #{id}
